name: langdetect (Language Detection)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); Python port of Google's language-detection library

performance.notes: Fast classification; microseconds to milliseconds per detection

agent_readiness.notes: Python port of Google's language-detection library. Detects 55 languages using a Naive Bayes classifier on character n-grams. detect(text) returns language code; detect_langs(text) returns list with probabilities. Non-deterministic by default (set seed for reproducible results). Supports: en, de, fr, es, zh, ja, ko, ar, and 47 more. Short text detection is less reliable. Lightweight, no external dependencies.

gotchas: Unreliable for very short texts (< 20 chars)
55 languages only — not comprehensive for rare languages
Unmaintained — no updates since 2014; consider lingua-py for active maintenance
best_when: Quick language detection for routing multilingual content
Filtering content by language in text pipelines
avoid_when: Very short texts or code snippets
Production needing active maintenance (use lingua-py or fasttext)
summary: langdetect is a Python port of Google's language-detection library using Naive Bayes on character n-grams. Detects 55 languages with confidence scores. Fast, lightweight, no dependencies. Key gotcha: non-deterministic without seeding. Best for routing multilingual content in NLP pipelines. Unmaintained since 2014 — consider lingua-py for active maintenance and better accuracy.
